DISCOVERY 302, DEFENDANT YANG DDS, INC. MOTION TO COMPEL INDEPENDENT MENTAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF IS GRANTED, NO OPPOSITION FILED. THE MENTAL EXAMINATION OF PLAINTIFF SHALL OCCUR JANUARY 11, 2019, AT THE OFFICE OF DR. RICHARD ZASLOV, TOTAL TIME NOT TO EXCEED FIVE HOURS. THE PARTIES SHALL AGREE ON A MUTUALLY AGREEABLE START TIME. THE DIAGNOSTIC TESTS AND PROCEDURES TO BE USED IN THE EXAMINATION ARE LIMITED TO THOSE STATED IN THE MOVING PAPERS: MINNESOTA MULTIPHASIC PERSONALITY INVENTORY II AND MILLON CLINICAL MULTIAXIAL INVENTORY III INCOMPLETE SENTENCES BLANK, AND SYMPTOM CHECKLIST. (CARPENTER V. SUP.CT. (2006) 141 CAL.APP.4TH 249, 260). ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE PRO TEM: CHARLES GEERHART; CLERK: WILLIAM TRUPEK; NOT REPORTED. (302/JPT)

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2019 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2019 Continued To Feb-01-19 At 01:00 P.M. In Dept 212

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff
Off Calendar Jan-04-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Bernadette Bantly, Esq., Bradley Curley Barrabee & Kowalski, Telephone 415-464-8888, appearing for Defendant;
No other appearance.

The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT YANG DDS, INC. Motion To Compel Independent Mental Examination Of Plaintiff.

Granted, no opposition. The mental examination of plaintiff shall occur January 11, 2019, at the office of Dr. Richard Zaslov, total time not to exceed five hours. The parties shall agree on a mutually agreeable start time. The diagnostic tests and procedures to be used in the examination are limited to those stated in the moving papers: Minnesota Multiphasic Personality Inventory II and Millon Clinical Multiaxial Inventory III Incomplete Sentences Blank, and Symptom Checklist. (Carpenter v. Sup.Ct. (2006) 141 Cal.App.4th 249, 260). Order is signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Charles Geerhart; Clerk: William Trupek; Not reported. (302/JPT)

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-18-2018 Set For Trial On Feb-11-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-09-2018 Continued To Jun-06-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-03-2018 Sustained
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopts the tentative ruling on DEFENDANT YANG DDS, INC.'s DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT as follows:

Defendant Yang's demurrers to causes of action 3, 4 and 5 are SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. The dates pled by the complaint show that these causes are jurisdictionally time-barred. (See Martin v. Lockheed Miss. & Space Co. (1994) 29 Cal.App.4th 1718, 1724.) No "mistake of prior attorney" exception applies.

Counsel for defendant is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's ruling and submit it in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer, Jr.; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Reporter: Reyes F. Hunter, CSR#6576, email: rhunter@sftc.org.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2018 Continued To Apr-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
